stories.headline: Albanian government halts Kushner-Ivanka resort project amid mass protests

perspectives.label: Conservative
perspectives.body: Protests in Albania continue. Even Albainian Americans are protesting here. Remember when the media all wanted you to know & hear about Iran protests, which were mostly astro turf & virtually no videos of Iran? Now they ignore Albania. Why?

perspectives.label: Independent
perspectives.body: 🇦🇱 | After 6 days of furious protests that changed nothing, violent armed clashes have now erupted in northern Albania. Enraged Albanians are rising up against the ultimate betrayal: their only island - the strategic military outpost of Sazan - is being sold to Jared Kushner.

perspectives.label: Democrat
perspectives.body: BREAKING: HELL YES! The European Union strikes a CRUSHING blow against Jared Kushner's corrupt resort development by warning Albania that it could endanger their efforts to join the EU. This scandal just shot through the stratosphere...

stories.headline: Russian forces withdraw from Kinburn Spit due to Ukrainian drone strikes

perspectives.label: Independent
perspectives.body: Russian forces according to reports are being forced to withdraw on mass from positions around the Kinburn Spit south of the Dnipro river due to severe supply difficulties caused by continued Ukrainian drone strike campaigns on Southern logistical routes.

stories.headline: Protests against Jared Kushner’s Albania resort project escalate into sovereignty and corruption battle

perspectives.label: Independent
perspectives.body: BREAKING: The Protests Against Jared Kushner’s Albania Resort Project Have Escalated. What started as a fight over protected wetlands and flamingo habitats has become something much bigger. Thousands of Albanians are now framing the project as a battle over sovereignty, corruption, and whether prime coastal land should be handed to politically connected foreign billionaires. Then came the signs. “Epstein’s Friends Are Not Welcome In Albania.” Now the European Commission is warning that the controversy could affect Albania’s EU ambitions. This is no longer a local zoning dispute. It’s becoming an international political fight.

stories.headline: Joe Rogan criticizes Bernie Sanders for shifting from millionaires to billionaires as the problem.
stories.body:
Joe Rogan can no longer hide how he really feels anymore after exposing to financial expert Caleb Hammer that Bernie Sanders is a total hypocrite:

ROGAN: “Bernie Sanders used to rally against millionaires, but now he’s a millionaire so he started moving the goalposts to billionaires being the problem. It’s adorable.”

HAMMER: “Even Gavin Newsom is starting to change his tune on the billionaire tax.”

ROGAN: “Yeah because all the billionaires are leaving his state. All he cares about is his personal gain. He doesn’t give any real answers to questions.”

HAMMER: “That’s true.”

ROGAN: “There’s a giant number of college kids now that think communism is the solution. They genuinely believe in it. It’s very scary.”

HAMMER: “They’re retarded. Communism has never worked anywhere ever.”

ROGAN: “These teachers and professors don’t live in the real world. They’ve never had their own business. They are brainwashing kids with ideas and concepts that don’t work at all in real life."

stories.headline: Nature Neuroscience study shows artificial induction of sleep-like brain activity refreshes the brain without actual sleep.
stories.body: 【起きたまま睡眠!?】眠らなくても、睡眠中と同じ脳活動パターンを人工的に作り出せば、あたかも睡眠をとったかのように脳がリフレッシュ（睡眠圧が低下し記憶力も回復）するそうです。マウスでの実証。今日の『ネイチャー神経科学』誌より→ https://www.nature.com/articles/s41593-026-02318-9?error=cookies_not_supported&code=f74c3464-bc43-4498-95ba-9dca89fcb4c9

stories.headline: Voter fraud allegations involving homeless in Los Angeles and Southern California
stories.body:
🚨 HOLY CRAP! It's been revealed that TENS OF THOUSANDS of homeless people in Los Angeles might be responsible for the last-minute Nithya Raman surge over Spencer Pratt

Recently, voter fraud was BUSTED on Skid Row

I bet many of them are ILLEGAL ALIENS and non-citizens!

Many of these people don't have IDs and can't prove who they are.

But leftist activists are deployed to the streets to harvest their "information" so they can get mail-in ballots.

FOX NEWS: "First Assistant U.S. attorney in LA, Bill Essayli, says California has refused to give the federal government its voter rolls and allows first-time voters to use IDs like gym and debit cards."

"Essayli also writes, California allows third parties to collect and turn in ballots on voters' behalf, a practice known as ballot harvesting, with few restrictions."

"This makes it difficult to track who actually received, completed, and submitted each ballot."

"Now, Essayli says there are ongoing voter fraud investigations here in Southern California. He points to a recent woman who was arrested for allegedly paying people on Skid Row to register to vote." — @MattFinnFNC

stories.headline: Video of illegal border crossing into Southern California near San Diego
stories.body:
Illegals are seen using a ladder to illegal enter America from Tijuana into San Diego

This location is at Border Field State Park. The border wall stretches about 300 feet into the ocean to stop illegals from entering America

As you can see, California does nothing to stop them and actually this has been encouraged for decades. Anyone in Southern California knows illegals pour into America at this location

There were lots of videos of this happening during the Biden Admin too

More illegal Democrats voters headed into California to sign up for benefits
